ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information about the subject */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the subject was enrolled in the study */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the subject */,
  "disease_type" TEXT /* Type of disease (if any) associated with the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "body_sites" (
  "body_site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each body site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the body site (e.g., gut, left palm) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the body site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of body site (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("body_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject this data belongs to */,
  "body_site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the body site this data was collected from */,
  "pc" TEXT /* Principal component identifier */,
  "sigma" REAL /* Sigma value from the model */,
  "lambda" REAL /* Lambda value from the model */,
  "theta" REAL /* Theta value from the model */,
  "nLogLik" REAL /* Log likelihood of the model */,
  "aic" REAL /* Akaike Information Criterion value */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of data analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_records_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_records_body_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("body_site_id") REFERENCES body_sites ("body_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "lead_researcher" TEXT /* Lead researcher of the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the team */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Funding agency supporting the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research team conducting the study */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES data_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistical model used */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data record analyzed */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value from the model result */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the result */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES statistical_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES data_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data record being checked */,
  "check_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality check performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the quality check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "date_checked" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  "check_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES data_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research project that led to the publication */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "publication_doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_publications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)
